pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; using it with Java 21 causes runtime failures or missing features required by the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21; keeping it at 11 would result in incorrect bytecode generation or build failures if strict source/target checks are enabled.

src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.general_idea: Replace deprecated Integer constructor with valueOf factory method.
src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.why_exists: The Integer(int) constructor is deprecated for removal in newer JDKs, causing deprecation warnings or compile errors with strict flags.

src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get with Path.of static factory method.
src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.why_exists: Paths.get is deprecated for removal in newer JDKs, causing deprecation warnings or compile errors with strict flags.
